pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 9 defines PROJECT_DIR with this exact path
setup_task.sh line 13 creates directory structure and line 83 creates the file
Generated file contains 50 occurrences of 'LegacyLogger.log' pattern verified by grep analysis
FluentLogger class definition in setup_task.sh line 65 shows public static FluentLogger at(LogLevel level) method
setup_task.sh generates 5 hardcoded LegacyLogger.log calls (lines 95, 101, 104, 108, 113) plus 45 in loop (lines 122-137), totaling 50. Task description (task.json line 5) states '~50 occurrences'

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Java refactoring project with a LogService.java file containing 50 LegacyLogger.log() calls that must be refactored to FluentLogger.at().withTime().log() pattern. The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/legacy-logging-system with the target file at src/main/java/com/logging/service/LogService.java. The legacy pattern 'LegacyLogger.log' is verified to appear exactly 50 times in the generated file, though the metadata understates this as min_expected_replacements of 45. The task description explicitly mentions '~50 occurrences' making the metadata value contradictory.
